Class Siunta

java.lang.Object
viko.eif.lt.simanaviciusd.PI24SN.task2.generated.Siunta
public class Siunta extends Object
<p>Java class for siunta complex type</p>. <p>The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.</p> <pre>{@code <complexType name="siunta"> <complexContent> <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType"> <sequence> <element name="adresas" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0" form="qualified"/> <element name="gavejas" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0" form="qualified"/> <element name="id" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" form="qualified"/> <element name="kaina" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}float" form="qualified"/> <element name="prioritetas" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort" form="qualified"/> <element name="pristatyta" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" form="qualified"/> <element name="produktai" type="{http://service.task2.PI24SN.simanaviciusd.lt.eif.viko/}produktas" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" form="qualified"/> <element name="svoris" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}float" form="qualified"/> </sequence> </restriction> </complexContent> </complexType> }</pre>

    • getProduktai

      public List<Produktas> getProduktai()
      Gets the value of the produktai property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the produktai property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

      getProduktai().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list Produktas

      Returns:
      The value of the produktai property.
